network_summary: Dr. Reem Shafi, DDS/DMD is the founder, owner, and CEO of Two Rivers Dental, a dentist-owned branded DSO with 20+ Chicagoland locations operating under distinct local trade names (Hanover Dental, Baker Hill Dental, Simply Dental, Two Rivers Dental, Absolute Dental, etc.). 140+ employees, 30+ dentists. No PE or MSO/management-company layer found — entirely dentist-owned. NPPES confirms Reem Shafi as OWNER (AO title) on all three NPI organizations in this cluster.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Reem S. Shafi, DDS/DMD — founder, owner, and CEO of Two Rivers Dental; Temple University Kornberg School of Dentistry 1998; opened first Chicago practice 2004; inducted Temple Fox School of Business League for Entrepreneurial Women Hall of Fame 2013
durable_artifacts: NPPES AO=REEM SHAFI title=OWNER across all 3 org NPIs (1811228166, 1720319072, 1558692806)
myhanoverdental.com/reem-shafi-dmd/ — Dr. Shafi listed as owner/CEO of Two Rivers Dental
bakerhilldental.com/reem-shafi-dmd/ — Dr. Shafi listed as owner/CEO of Two Rivers Dental
mysimplydental.com/staff/ — Two Rivers Dental network language used on Simply Dental staff page
Illinois Tech Elevate interview: 'Reem Shafi, Owner and CEO, Two Rivers Dental — 20 locations Chicago and 1 California' (elevate.iit.edu)
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: Absolute Dental PC (60467) website features Dr. Jasmeen Singh and Dr. Chris Park as the operating dentists; Reem Shafi does not appear on yourabsolutedental.com. Her NPPES AO title is OWNER, suggesting she owns the PC entity but may have stepped back from clinical operations at this location. The NPPES AO-owner link is real but the consumer-facing brand is run by different clinicians.
evidence_chain: AO signal: REEM SHAFI appears as NPPES authorized official (title=OWNER) on 3 distinct GP org-NPIs across 3 IL ZIPs (60133, 60137, 60467). Documentary corroboration: (1) bakerhilldental.com and myhanoverdental.com both carry a 'Dr. Reem Shafi, DMD' bio page identifying her as CEO of Two Rivers Dental; (2) mysimplydental.com staff page contains the text 'All professionals at Two Rivers Dental maintain the highest levels of accreditation' while branded Simply Dental — confirming the common Two Rivers platform; (3) Illinois Tech Elevate interview independently confirms 'Owner and CEO, Two Rivers Dental, 20 locations Chicago + 1 California, 140 employees, 30 dentists.' All three locations in this AO cluster are independently branded PCs with Reem Shafi as NPPES OWNER, confirmed as part of the Two Rivers Dental multi-location family dentistry brand.
future_app_notes: Prior-session backfill71 SHAFI x17 reference likely refers to a larger set of Shafi/Two Rivers Dental NPIs across more ZIPs — this cluster's 3 locations are a subset. The full Two Rivers network reportedly has 20+ IL locations; only 3 of those appear in the reach=3 AO cluster file here, suggesting many other Shafi PCs exist in the watched-IL dataset under different AO registrations or individual NPIs. Recommend: (1) query all practice_locations where NPPES AO contains 'SHAFI' to find the full Two Rivers footprint; (2) check whether Two Rivers Dental or any of its PCs have taken on growth capital or an MSO partner as the network scales past 20 locations (no evidence found as of 2026-06-21 but worth monitoring); (3) verify whether Absolute Dental PC (60467) should be reclassified now that a different clinical team is operating it — the NPPES OWNER record may lag behind a partial divestiture or partnership.

classifications.reasoning: ABSOLUTE DENTAL PC at 18014 Wolf Rd, Orland Park IL 60467. NPPES unambiguously lists REEM SHAFI as OWNER (not just admin contact) for this org-NPI.
